entry.title: Turn my brain off
entry.summary:
Author: twowontown

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,787Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: It has been a very exhausting week for the Justice League. Everybody wants to rest. And that includes the big brain contingency planner, Batman. He doesn’t speaks on it, nor asks for it. Good old Bruce Wayne. Gladly, someone who memorized his heartbeat knew about it.

entry.title: On Your Mind
entry.summary:
Author: pusheenlover69

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,657Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: “I touched myself while I was watching you. I’m so sorry B, I know it was so wrong, and I promise. It'll never happen again, I really, really promise. I understand if you don’t forgive me-” His rambling is interrupted by Bruce’s hushing.“Don’t cry, Clark. I’m not mad.” He says, offering a sweet smile. Clark can’t help the corners of his own lips from tugging naturally at the sight. Bruce leans in, pressing his firm body against Clarks and moving his mouth to the taller man’s ear.“You’re going to show me, Clark. You’re going to show me exactly what you wanted to do as you watched me.” Bruce growled.orPart 2 of my previous work, By Chance!

entry.title: New World Order
entry.summary:
Author: MalloryB

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,864Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 133

Summary: Superman’s image has been dragged through the mud beyond repair, and the only people still willing to get dirty defending him are the people of Juhnrpan. And Bruce Wayne, for some reason. Meanwhile, the Batman is increasingly concerned about Superman’s erratic behavior following his involvement in the Juhnrpan vs Boravia conflict and decides the best way to investigate is through Superman’s only known associate: Daily Planet reporter Clark Kent. Or Krypto isn’t captured by Lex Luthor and Clark refuses to turn himself in. That sets off quite the chain reaction. Alternatively titled: How to Become a Dictator in Few Easy Steps! (Plus Superbat identity porn!)

entry.title: I Want to Know You
entry.summary:
Author: dueefbigfard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,096Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 157

Summary: Clark heard the static of Nightwing’s earpiece crackle to life as Oracle started talking. “There’s an attempted breaking and entering, half a mile south of you. Can you—” “On it.” Dick sprang to his feet and rolled his shoulders back, and suddenly Nightwing wasn’t just a story Clark had shared with a little boy all those years ago. “That’s my cue. See you around, Supes.” “Of course. Real quick, though,” Clark added, a little desperate. “If he’s not like…that, then what is Bruce actually like when he’s drunk?” “My friend,” Dick said, holding Clark by the shoulders in mock seriousness. “Perhaps one day you will know—but today is not that day.” “Right, of course, sure.” Bats and their secrets. “Be careful out there, buddy.” “Always am,” Dick said, lying through his teeth as he dropped ever so casually from the building.   5 times Clark thought Bruce was drunk, and one time he actually was

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,718Chapters: 33/33Kudos: 1,880

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.AKA: A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background and I burn through kinks faster than a sorority freshman. Seriously, I’m running out of ideas, leave a comment with a suggestion and I’ll see what I can do.AKA: That time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.

entry.title: The wedding
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,247Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 210

Summary: "Was there any doubt?" Nightwing asked, with a certainty he didn't feel, wondering whose damned wedding this could be. " Well, of course no. You knew them for ages, you saw shit. You will be extra happy to be Batman’s best man.”   Nightwing felt his heart sink. "Batman's best man..." Cyborg didn't seem to notice his discomfort, and continued, "Well, congratulations. I'm still hurt, but I'm glad those two finally worked things out. And I'm happy for you. You always wanted Superman to be your stepdad. I bet when you found out, nine-year-old you screamed like a..." Dick didn't hear the rest of the sentence. A long white noise had replaced Victor's words, his legs feeling like curd.   Bruce was getting married. And Dick didn't know anything.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,755Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 1,118

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.title: We Could Be Heroes - A SuperBat Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,646Chapters: 47/?Kudos: 456

Summary: "I’ve made a lot of mistakes in my life, and for a long time, I thought I’d continue to fall into darkness. But Clark is like a shining light. He inspires me to be a better person.” Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent both maintain a strong sense of justice and fight for peace in their respective cities. However, both are struggling to maintain order alone, and are weighed down by a lost sense of identity and the loneliness that stems from the isolation of living a double life. After a chance encounter, the pair agree to form a Justice League to address the growing threat to Earth's security. As they learn to work together, new feelings blossom, and the heroes soon find themselves leaning on each other for support and comfort. Slow-burn romance. Bat-family drama. Justice League shenanigans. Bruce being a rich kid with issues. Superman being an innocent lad. Your favorite black cat/golden retriever boys are in for a wild ride.

entry.title: A Little Spider Caught up in a Hood
entry.summary:
Author: FayeVilla418

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,811Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 1,341

Summary: Peter wakes up to green. He died. But he's alive. And in another universe too, neat. He breaks out of the glass tube He was in, goes feral, attacking the scientists that had him locked up. He has turned into more of a spider, he never used to have fangs or venom. The door gets broken down while Peter's jaws are still clamped down on a quickly fading flailing kidnapper. It's Red Hood. Red Hood takes in the situation and decides to take Peter, keep him at a safe house, under lock and key, away from the bats, who had gotten to the Lazura's pit just after Jason had left. Peter tries to accept these new changes and this new universe, knowing that there was almost absolutely no way back. And no one would look for him either. At least he has Jason. But the bats break into the safe house Pete's staying at and immedietly assume that Peter is Jason's bf. Anytime they try to deny it, it just feeds into their assumption. Oh well.

entry.title: Seven minutes in heaven
entry.summary:
Author: SubtleSolstice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 266,453Chapters: 40/40Kudos: 901

Summary: Dick Grayson thought it would be harmless, one chill night where the Young Justice crew and the Titans could actually relax together. No missions. No explosions. Just friends, laughter… and maybe a little too much alcohol. But when a round of Never Have I Ever spirals into Seven Minutes in Heaven, Dick and Wally find themselves a little too close in the dark — and suddenly, nothing feels simple anymore. Or;Wally and Dick’s developing relationship, full of tension, tenderness, and the two of them absolutely failing to keep their hands to themselves.

  • Wally West Needs a Hug

entry.title: More than a feeling
entry.summary:
Author: Elijahlover

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 307Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Clark is Bruce Wayne's number one fan because of how much he does for Gotham, people in need and how he makes Clark wish that he was licking sweat off of Bruce's abs- WHAT who said that... ahem anyways despite being a journalist he never gets assigned to anything remotely close to the billionaire Gothamite but when Cat asks Clark to cover a charity gala in Gotham with her who's Clark to say no as long as he even gets a glimpse of the man in his wet dreams- I mean of Bruce.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,882Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 87

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends
